blocks.title: DeterministicFollowUps
rows: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the digital signature functionality.

resultPayload.note: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of a digital signature from the site supervisor in the daily report. However, while the use case mentions that the site supervisor signs the report digitally, there is no concrete evidence provided that confirms the functionality of the digital signature feature through API reads or persisted state checks. This lack of verification leads to a conclusion that there is a gap in the requirement coverage for this specific need.
gaps: No evidence confirming the functionality of the digital signature feature.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the digital signature functionality.
